description.value: When you speak something's true name as part of a binding weave, the magic carries an authority that transcends ordinary compulsion.

system.benefits: When you cast a control or compulsion weave against a creature you have used True Name Seeker on, that creature adds 1 to both saving throw dice. Additionally, if the creature fails its save, the condition duration increases by one step on the duration table. This benefit applies once per creature per encounter.
